'''竏喩-zh-d-v''' ('''kagazhdevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:animalize|animalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-zh-d-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:animalize|animalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喩-zh-d-v
|-
! Lemma
| kagazhdevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigazhdevoko|thigazhdevoko]] || [[word:jigazhdevoko|jigazhdevoko]] || [[word:shigazhdevoko|shigazhdevoko]] || [[word:kigazhdevoko|kigazhdevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugazhdevoko|thuthugazhdevoko]] || [[word:jujugazhdevoko|jujugazhdevoko]] || [[word:shushugazhdevoko|shushugazhdevoko]] || [[word:kukugazhdevoko|kukugazhdevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugazhdevoko|thugazhdevoko]] || [[word:jugazhdevoko|jugazhdevoko]] || [[word:shugazhdevoko|shugazhdevoko]] || [[word:kugazhdevoko|kugazhdevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugazhdevoko|thugazhdevoko]] || [[word:jugazhdevoko|jugazhdevoko]] || [[word:shugazhdevoko|shugazhdevoko]] || [[word:kugazhdevoko|kugazhdevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegazhdevoko|thegazhdevoko]] || [[word:jegazhdevoko|jegazhdevoko]] || [[word:shegazhdevoko|shegazhdevoko]] || [[word:kegazhdevoko|kegazhdevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogazhdevoko|thothogazhdevoko]] || [[word:jojogazhdevoko|jojogazhdevoko]] || [[word:shoshogazhdevoko|shoshogazhdevoko]] || [[word:kokogazhdevoko|kokogazhdevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogazhdevoko|thogazhdevoko]] || [[word:jogazhdevoko|jogazhdevoko]] || [[word:shogazhdevoko|shogazhdevoko]] || [[word:kogazhdevoko|kogazhdevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogazhdevoko|thogazhdevoko]] || [[word:jogazhdevoko|jogazhdevoko]] || [[word:shogazhdevoko|shogazhdevoko]] || [[word:kogazhdevoko|kogazhdevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦgazhdevoko|thﾃｦgazhdevoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦgazhdevoko|jﾃｦgazhdevoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦgazhdevoko|shﾃｦgazhdevoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦgazhdevoko|kﾃｦgazhdevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagazhdevoko|thathagazhdevoko]] || [[word:jajagazhdevoko|jajagazhdevoko]] || [[word:shashagazhdevoko|shashagazhdevoko]] || [[word:kakagazhdevoko|kakagazhdevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagazhdevoko|thagazhdevoko]] || [[word:jagazhdevoko|jagazhdevoko]] || [[word:shagazhdevoko|shagazhdevoko]] || [[word:kagazhdevoko|kagazhdevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagazhdevoko|thagazhdevoko]] || [[word:jagazhdevoko|jagazhdevoko]] || [[word:shagazhdevoko|shagazhdevoko]] || [[word:kagazhdevoko|kagazhdevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagazhdevithi|shagazhdevithi]] || [[word:shagazhdeviji|shagazhdeviji]] || [[word:shagazhdevishi|shagazhdevishi]] || [[word:shagazhdeviki|shagazhdeviki]]

|-

|-

|}
